app.name: Dealo Hub
app.tagline: The first AI-Protected C2C Marketplace in the Gulf

home.heroSubline: The first AI-Protected C2C marketplace in the Gulf. Human-written listings, safer chat, trust you can feel.

meta.title: Dealo Hub — AI-Protected C2C Marketplace for the Gulf
meta.description: Buy and sell from people in Kuwait and the Gulf. Private chat, human-written listings, AI fraud protection.

hero.subline: Human-written listings. Private chat — no exposed phone numbers. AI fraud protection. Launching in Kuwait, then the Gulf.

waitlist.sellerCheckbox: I'd like to sell at launch
waitlist.privacyNote: We'll only email you when we launch. Never shared.
waitlist.alreadyOnList: You're already on the list — thanks for your interest.
waitlist.successDetail: We'll notify you the moment we launch — expect a message within 4-6 weeks.
waitlist.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
waitlist.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.

trust.heading: Three pillars that set us apart
trust.subheading: Every product decision serves one principle: trust first.

chat.title: Private chat — no phone number
chat.description: Phone numbers stay hidden. All conversations happen in-app via structured chat. No WhatsApp spam, no harassment.
chat.vsCompetitor: Instead of your number being public to every visitor on OpenSooq or Dubizzle.

ai.title: AI-Protected marketplace
ai.description: Every listing passes 5 AI safety checks before going live: authentic photos, clean text, reasonable pricing, no duplicates, verified seller.
ai.vsCompetitor: The first C2C platform in the Gulf with proactive AI protection for both buyer and seller.

human.title: Human-written listings
human.description: AI helps with categorization and pricing — but YOU write the description. Every listing reflects the seller's own voice.
human.vsCompetitor: Instead of machine-generated listings that all sound identical.

categories.heading: 10 focused categories — not 50 empty ones
categories.subheading: We focus on markets with real demand and room for better UX — rather than opening everything and becoming another generic classifieds site.
categories.footnote: Starred (★) categories are our launch priority — electronics, furniture, luxury, baby & kids.

tips: Meet in a safe public place

signup.title: Create your Dealo Hub account
signup.subtitle: Join the waitlist and start selling the moment we launch.
signup.termsAcceptance: I agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
signup.phoneComingSoonNote: Phone signup arrives with our Kuwait SMS launch. Use email for now.
signup.checkEmail: Check your inbox — we sent a confirmation link to finish signup.

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in to manage your listings and messages.
signin.noAccount: New to Dealo Hub? <link>Create an account</link>

verifyOtp.title: Verify your account
verifyOtp.subtitle: We sent a confirmation link to your email.
verifyOtp.emailOnlyNote: Open the email from Dealo Hub and click the link inside — you'll be signed in automatically.
verifyOtp.phoneComingSoon: Phone verification arrives with our Kuwait SMS launch in Sprint 6.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
reset.emailSent: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset link. Check your inbox.

resetConfirm.title: Choose a new password
resetConfirm.subtitle: Pick something strong — 10+ characters with letters and numbers.
resetConfirm.success: Password updated. You can now sign in with your new password.

myListings.title: My listings
myListings.placeholder: Your listings will show here once the listing creation flow ships (BRIEF-004).

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.validation_failed: Please check the form and try again.
errors.email_already_registered: An account with this email already exists.
errors.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email first — check your inbox for the link.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.password_needs_letter: Password must include at least one letter.
errors.password_needs_number: Password must include at least one number.
errors.password_too_weak: Password is too weak. Use at least 10 characters with letters and numbers.
errors.name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.phone_invalid: Enter a valid Kuwait phone number.
errors.terms_required: Please accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue.
errors.signup_failed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
errors.signin_failed: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
errors.update_password_failed: We couldn't update your password. The link may have expired.
errors.phone_auth_not_available: Phone signup isn't available yet — use email.
